name: Amortentia
effect: The most powerful love potion in the world. It causes a powerful infatuation or obsession from the drinker.

name: Draught of Living Death
effect: A powerful sleeping draught that brings on a sleep so deep it mimics death.

name: Felix Felicis
effect: Also known as 'Liquid Luck', it makes the drinker lucky for a period of time, during which everything they attempt will be successful.

name: Polyjuice Potion
effect: Allows the drinker to assume the form of someone else.
ingredients: A piece of the person you want to turn into

name: Veritaserum
effect: A powerful truth serum. The drinker is forced to answer any questions put to them truthfully.

name: Skele-Gro
effect: Regrows missing bones. The process is famously slow and painful.

name: Drink of Despair
effect: Induces terrible pain, horrifying visions, and extreme thirst. Used by Voldemort to protect his Horcrux.

name: Wolfsbane Potion
effect: Allows a werewolf to keep their human mind during transformation.

name: Pepperup Potion
effect: Cures the common cold and warms the drinker up, causing smoke to steam from their ears.

name: Elixir of Life
effect: Extends life infinitely, so long as it is consumed regularly.
